summary: Frontend-only testing for RADAR V22 FB Strategy final corrections: (1) target CANNOT be newest number c — only b,c-match (target=a oldest) and a,c-match (target=b middle) valid; (2) hit detection restored (pattern disappears when new number is in entry list); (3) countdown expiry after 3 attempts. ALL 8 test scenarios PASSED.

tests_executed.name: T2 INVALID 3→3→8 (a,b match, target=c=8 newest)
tests_executed.details: No pattern formed. Empty state 'Padrões FB aparecerão aqui' shown.

tests_executed.name: T4 INVALID 33→15→5 (a,b match root6, target=c=5 newest)
tests_executed.details: No pattern formed. Empty state shown.

tests_executed.name: T5 Hit 1st attempt — form [8,3,3], add 17
tests_executed.details: Pattern disappeared immediately after entering 17 (in entry list).

tests_executed.name: T6 Hit 3rd attempt — [8,3,3] + 1 + 2 + 17
tests_executed.details: Tentativas decremented 3→2→1, then 17 (in entry) triggered hit, pattern removed.

tests_executed.name: T7 Countdown expiry — [8,3,3] + 1 + 2 + 4
tests_executed.details: Tentativas decremented 3→2→1 then 0 on 3rd non-entry number (4), pattern removed without hit.

tests_executed.name: T8 Multiple patterns coexist (until own expiry)
tests_executed.details: First [8,3,3] pattern retained while decrementing through 4,33,5; new [33,5,15] pattern correctly formed with target=5, Entrada=[5,14,23,32]. First pattern's attemptsLeft reached 0 exactly when it should have, so final state shows new pattern (expected).

critical_code_review_comments: RadarTab.jsx is 692 lines. Past recommendation to split sub-components still applies (close to 700-line threshold).
detectFBPattern (lines 156-166) is clean with explicit branches for b,c-match and a,c-match and `null` fallback for a,b-match — logic matches spec exactly.
FB hit/countdown effect (lines 183-210) uses prevGirosLen ref to avoid double-running on rerender — correct pattern for this use case.
seed_data_creation: None — used in-session btn-N clicks and LIMPAR between each scenario.
context_for_next_testing_agent: FB Strategy final logic verified: only b,c-match (target=a oldest) and a,c-match (target=b middle) valid; a,b-match (target=c newest) explicitly invalid. Hit detection works 1st/2nd/3rd attempt. Countdown expires after exactly 3 non-entry additions. Multi-pattern coexistence works — each pattern tracks its own attemptsLeft independently. detectFBPattern at lines 156-166 and hit/countdown useEffect at lines 183-210 are the key implementations.
